## Sizing Guide (for $1M book)

**Tier 1 (Buy Now):** 6 positions
- **Mega-cap (META, ADBE, AVGO, ORCL):** $20-30k each (2-3% per position)
- **ETF (VXUS, VWO):** $30-40k each (3-4% per position) — more volatility, more upside

**Tier 2 (Conditional):** Hold cash / wait for triggers
- **MSFT:** $15-20k on alert trigger
- **GOOG:** $15-20k on alert trigger

**Total deployment:** ~$150-180k across Tier 1 (immediately); reserve $30-40k for Tier 2 triggers

## Risk Stops (Sell If Broken)

| Asset | Stop Level | Trigger Type | Why This Matters |
|-------|-----------|--------------|-----------------|
| META | FPE > 35 (earnings guidance cut) | Earnings miss | If growth slows below +40%, thesis broken |
| ADBE | Revenue growth < +15% | Guidance cut | AI adoption slower than expected |
| AVGO | FPE > 22 | Earnings miss | Custom silicon demand falters |
| ORCL | Revenue growth < +15% | Guidance cut | Cloud AI adoption stalls |
| VXUS | Relative underperformance > 5% vs SPY for 6mo | Technical | Dollar strength reverses thesis |
| VWO | -20% from entry without recovery | Technical | EM recession / China slowdown |
